title: lolium × subnutans
intro: Lolium × subnutans, also known as intermediate ryegrass, is a hybrid grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lolium × subnutans include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and wellness practices.
